response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified first song "Hello/How Are You" (ハロ/ハワユ) from top-left corner text. Used search: "Hello/How Are You" Neru Japanese and English lyrics.
2. Identified second song "you" from on-screen credit. Artist is dai, Lyricist is 癒月. Used search: "you" Higurashi Japanese and English lyrics.
3. Extracted lyrics and mapped them to the identified scenes.
response.global_summary: A two-song performance featuring members of hololive English. The first song is a group cover of the Vocaloid song "Hello/How Are You" (ハロ/ハワユ), followed by a solo performance of "you" from the Higurashi When They Cry soundtrack.

scenes.description: Group performance of "Hello/How Are You". Title appears in top-left corner at the start.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ハロ、ハワユ
窓を開けて　小さく呟いた
ハワユ？
誰もいない部屋で　一人
モーニング
朝が来たよ
なんて　面倒くさい生き物でしょう
人間と　いうのは
一体　何に　怯えて
隠してしまうのでしょう？
本当は　聞いて　欲しいのでしょう？
絶対に　笑ったり　しないから
話して　みませんか？
口を　開けなければ
何も　分からない
頭の中で　考えているだけでは
何も　伝わらない
なんて　面倒くさい生き物でしょう
人間と　いうのは
ハロー、ハワユ
あなたに　言うよ
ハロー、ハワユ
ハロー、ハワユ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hello, how are you?
I opened my window and softly whispered, "How are you?"
In a room where there's no one else, it's just me and my own echo.
It's morning, and the sun shines, but it doesn't feel like morning.
I'm just waiting here, for the day to end.
What a troublesome creature, the one called a human.
Why do I always end up hiding my true feelings?
Is it that I want you to hear me?
I won't know if you don't open your mouth.
You won't convey anything just by thinking.
What a troublesome creature, the one called a human.
I'm sure you won't laugh at me, so why don't you try telling me?
Hello, how are you?
I ask you: "Hello, how are you?"

scenes.description: Solo performance of "you" from Higurashi When They Cry. Credits for "you", "Composition: dai", and "Lyrics: 癒月" appear on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あなたは今　どこで何をしていますか
この空の続く場所にいますか
今まで私の心を埋めていたもの
失って初めて　気づいた
一緒に歌ったあの歌も
ポケットに入れて
失ってしまった　大きな宇宙
大きすぎて　大きすぎて
取り戻そうと　必死に
手を伸ばしても
伸ばしても　届かない
まるで　風の音のように
通り抜けて　届いて
届かない
この孤独と　絶望に
胸を締め付けられ
心が　壊れそうに
なっても
思い出に残る　あなたの笑顔が
いつも　私を励ましてくれる
もう一度　あの頃に
戻りたい
今度は　きっと大丈夫
いつものように　隣で笑ってくれる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Where are you now and what are you doing?
Are you in the place where the sky continues?
The things that filled my heart until now,
I lost them and realized for the first time.
I put even the song we sang together into my pocket.
I lost it, the great universe,
it's too big, it's too big,
I reached out my hand and desperately tried to take it back,
but even though I reached out, I couldn't reach it.
It's just like passing through the wind,
it arrived, but it didn't reach.
This fear, despair, squeezes my heart,
my heart is about to break,
but I'll still keep the smile that remains in my memory,
you always encourage me.
I want to go back to that time once more,
next time, surely it will be okay.
Let's smile together as always, right by your side.
